## Summary
- Describe the change in 1-3 bullets.

## Scope
- [ ] Retail-only behavior verified
- [ ] No unrelated file changes
- [ ] One issue/fix per PR

## Validation
- [ ] Lua syntax is clean
- [ ] No deprecated retail APIs reintroduced
- [ ] In-game validation completed (if applicable)

## Checklist
- [ ] PR title follows `type(scope): summary`
- [ ] Branch name follows `fix/<topic>` or `chore/<topic>`
- [ ] Changelog/release impact considered
